title: carya glabra var. odorata
intro: Carya glabra var. odorata, also known as the smoothbark hickory, is a variety of deciduous tree native to eastern North America. The medicinal properties of this plant have been utilized for centuries, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Carya glabra var. odorata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to promote overall well-being and to combat infections.
